html:
“Emits light like a torch and gives a 20% speed boost while worn.”

-

Magiluminescence is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires 2 Thulecite, 3 Nightmare Fuel and 1 Yellow Gem, and at least a broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It can also drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when the latter is damaged with a Hammer, Gunpowder, etc and from the Large Ornate Chest. Like all items from the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter, Magiluminescences cannot be prototyped, and can only be crafted near another Ancient Pseudoscience Station.

While equipped in the chest slot, it will provide a small amount of light around the player (similar to that of a Torch), preventing attacks from Charlie, and grant a 20% bonus to movement speed. It will also provide the Character with a passive +2 per minute.

The Magiluminescence will slowly lose durability while equipped, and it will last for 8 minutes (1 Day). That said, it can be refueled with Nightmare Fuel, which will increase its durability by 37.5% (3 minutes) per every 1 Nightmare Fuel.

Yellow Gems are renewable, making the Magiluminescence a renewable item.

Players have a 0.01% chance of finding Yellow Gems inside Tumbleweeds.


Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Nouveau Amulet was Twitch Drops and was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from October 19, 2023 to November 2, 2023.
  • The Proof of Purchase Firebrite Amulet skin is obtained by purchasing the Willow Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
Woven - Elegant
Nom de Plume Collection
Mind's Eye Amulet
Authors are always in need of bright ideas to achieve their vision.
Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Faint Gleam Amulet
There is always hope.
Loyal
Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Amulet
The artful design of this pendant is nothing short of brilliant.
Proof of Purchase
Firebrite Amulet
Keep the comforting glow of firelight close to your heart.

Tips

  • The speed bonus stacks with the Walking Cane or The Lazy Explorer, for a total increase of 45% movement speed (88.5% on Roads).
    • In Don't Starve Together, the speed multiplier is the product of all multipliers of equipped items and roads and characters.
  • Unlike Lanterns, Miner Hats etc., Magiluminescences are destroyed when durability reaches 0%, so extra care is needed to prevent their loss.
  • If players plan on keeping a Magiluminescence equipped at all times for the speed boost, it will cost them roughly 2.7 Nightmare Fuel per day. That means a stack of 40 for seasons that last 15 days, and 54 for those that last 20. That said, it is not advised to keep it equipped while not traversing big distances, like when crafting multiple items or harvesting from Farms, since the advantage in movement speed is negligible for too much cost.

Trivia

  • When placed on the ground, the Magiluminescence used to glow and not lose any durability. As of the A Moderately Friendly Update, they will no longer glow when dropped on the ground.
  • The Magiluminescence shares the same in-game model with the Nightmare Amulet, but its gem is yellow instead of purple.
  • This is the only light-emitting item that can be equipped in the chest slot.
  • Before the Release the Quacken update for Shipwrecked, Magiluminescence could not be refueled with Nightmare Fuel. This change was applied to the other game versions too.
    • Magiluminescence has been refuelable with Nightmare Fuel in Don't Starve Together since the update Rev. 172848 on April 7, 2016.
  • Wickerbottom states the amulet glows at "mid 530 nanometer wavelength." However, a wavelength of ~535 nm is a green light, not yellow, mid 530 means that the brightness peaks at around 530, and other wavelengths of light, mostly red, are also mixed in, resulting in yellow.

–Wendy

–Wickerbottom

–Maxwell

–Wigfrid

“Puts some pep in my step!”
–Warly
“Can go zoomy now!”

–Winona
“I'll give my brain a slight refrain.”
–Wortox
“Feel warm...”
–Wurt
“With this on, I'm invincible! Right?”
–Walter
“Just the boost I needed.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Phát quang huyền ảo là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Giả Khoa Cổ Đại. Nó cần 2 Thulecite, 3 Nhiên liệu Ác mộng và 1 Ngọc Vàng, và ít nhất một Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại bị hỏng để chế tạo. Nó cũng có thể rơi ra từ Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại khi Trạm giả khoa này bị hư hại bởi Búa, Thuốc súng, v.v. và từ Rương trang trí công phu lớn. Giống như tất cả các vật phẩm từ Bộ lọc Giả khoa học Cổ đại, Đèn phát quang huyền ảo không thể được tạo nguyên mẫu và chỉ có thể được chế tạo gần một Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại khác.

Right? |wanda = Just the boost I needed. |choose = willow }} {{Scrapbook_Info|Emits light like a torch and gives a 20% speed boost while worn.}} '''Magiluminescence''' is a craftable [[Item]] found in the [[Ancient Pseudoscience Filter]]. It requires 2 [[Thulecite]], 3 [[Nightmare Fuel]] and 1 [[Yellow Gem]], and at least a broken [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] to craft. It can also drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when the latter is damaged with a [[Hammer]], [[Gunpowder]], etc and from the [[Large Ornate Chest]]. Like all items from the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter, Magiluminescences cannot be prototyped, and can only be crafted near another Ancient Pseudoscience Station. While equipped in the chest slot, it will provide a small amount of light around the player (similar to that of a [[Torch]]), preventing attacks from [[Charlie]], and grant a 20% bonus to movement [[Player Speed|speed]]. It will also provide the Character with a passive +2 {{sanity}} per minute. The Magiluminescence will slowly lose durability while equipped, and it will last for 8 minutes (1 [[Day]]). That said, it can be refueled with [[Nightmare Fuel]], which will increase its durability by 37.5% (3 minutes) per every 1 Nightmare Fuel. Yellow Gems are renewable, making the Magiluminescence a renewable item. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * The speed bonus stacks with the [[Walking Cane]] or [[The Lazy Explorer]], for a total increase of 45% movement speed (88.5% on [[Road]]s). ** In ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', the speed multiplier is the product of all multipliers of equipped items and roads and characters. * Unlike [[Lantern]]s, [[Miner Hat]]s etc., Magiluminescences are destroyed when durability reaches 0%, so extra care is needed to prevent their loss. * If players plan on keeping a Magiluminescence equipped at all times for the speed boost, it will cost them roughly 2.7 Nightmare Fuel per day. That means a stack of 40 for seasons that last 15 days, and 54 for those that last 20. That said, it is not advised to keep it equipped while not traversing big distances, like when crafting multiple items or harvesting from [[Farms]], since the advantage in movement speed is negligible for too much cost. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * When placed on the ground, the Magiluminescence used to glow and not lose any durability. As of the ''[[Version History#A Moderately Friendly Update|A Moderately Friendly Update]]'', they will no longer glow when dropped on the ground. * The Magiluminescence shares the same in-game model with the [[Nightmare Amulet]], but its gem is yellow instead of purple. * This is the only light-emitting item that can be equipped in the chest slot. * Before the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 25, 2016 - Release the Quacken Update|Release the Quacken]]'' update for ''Shipwrecked'', Magiluminescence could not be refueled with Nightmare Fuel. This change was applied to the other game versions too. ** Magiluminescence has been refuelable with Nightmare Fuel in ''Don't Starve Together'' since the update Rev. 172848 on April 7, 2016. * [[Wickerbottom]] states the amulet glows at "mid 530 nanometer wavelength." However, a wavelength of ~535 nm is a green light, not yellow, mid 530 means that the brightness peaks at around 530, and other wavelengths of light, mostly red, are also mixed in, resulting in yellow. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Magiluminescence= Magiluminescence Dropped.png|Dropped Magiluminescence Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Mind's Eye Amulet= Mind's Eye Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Mind's Eye Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Nouveau Amulet= Nouveau Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Nouveau Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Faint Gleam Amulet= Faint Gleam Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Faint Gleam Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Firebrite Amulet= Firebrite Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Firebrite Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Magiluminescence Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Magiluminescence.
